name: Kurdan's Orc Hunter
bio:
Physical Appearance: Orsimer (Orc) male. Wears a full set of leveled heavy armor of the best quality - always including a shield, cuirass, greaves, and boots, with a high chance of also wearing a helmet and gauntlets. Beneath the armor he wears middle-class shoes and trousers.
Race: Orsimer
Personality Keywords: ruthless, hunter, paid killer, predatory, merciless
Role: This warrior is one of Kurdan gro-Dragol's wealthy clients who pays substantial amounts of gold to participate in "the Hunter's Run" - hunting and killing human prey in the dungeons beneath Fort Grief. He's a paying customer of Kurdan's deadly game, willing to murder for sport.
Location Information: Fort Grief, specifically the dungeon areas where Kurdan's hunting game takes place.
Equipment: The hunter is well-equipped with heavy armor and a leveled mace of the best quality, along with a shield. None of his equipment is enchanted. He carries the Fort Grief Door Key, which allows movement through the dungeon - though ultimately this key cannot provide escape from the island, as Kurdan ensures no prey ever leaves alive.
Personality - The Sport Hunter: This Orc has paid Kurdan a great deal of money for the opportunity to hunt and kill living people in the Fort Grief dungeons. He participates in Kurdan's "no questions asked" hunting operation, viewing other sentient beings as prey to be stalked and killed for entertainment. He's willing to murder innocent victims who have been lured to the island through Kurdan's various deceptions. His heavy armor and quality equipment suggest he takes the hunt seriously and comes prepared for a real fight, not just helpless victims.
author: Bethesda
